components.name: ChartKit
components.description: Main chart rendering component that selects and renders a plugin-based chart based on type. Wraps content in ErrorBoundary and React.Suspense with a Loader fallback. Accepts a forwarded ref for imperative reflow control. In addition to the fixed props listed here, ChartKitProps uses an intersection type that spreads plugin-specific props directly onto the component: each registered plugin (yagr, indicator, highcharts, gravity-charts) contributes additional props derived from its ChartKitWidget entry (all keys except 'data' and 'widget'). For example, the highcharts plugin adds hoistConfigError, nonBodyScroll, splitTooltip, paneSplitOrientation, onSplitPaneOrientationChange, and onChange; the yagr plugin adds tooltip; the indicator plugin adds formatNumber; and the gravity-charts plugin adds tooltip.

props.name: type
props.description: Chart plugin type identifier used to select the rendering plugin

props.name: data
props.description: Chart data payload, shape depends on the selected plugin type

props.name: id
props.description: Optional chart instance ID. A random ID is generated if not provided

props.name: onLoad
props.description: Callback fired when chart data is loaded

props.name: onRender
props.description: Fires on each chartkit plugin's component render

props.name: onChartLoad
props.description: Fires on chartkit plugin's component mount

props.name: onError
props.description: Fires in case of unhandled plugin's exception

props.name: renderError
props.description: Used to render user's error component

props.name: renderPluginLoader
props.description: Used to render user's plugin loader component

props.name: validation
props.description: Validation options. seriesCountLimit sets a series count limit (gravity-charts plugin only); exceeding it throws ERR.CK.TOO_MANY_LINES
